title: pelargonium × chrysanthemifolium
intro: Pelargonium × chrysanthemifolium, also known as the Cape Geranium or Chrysanthemoid Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues and relieve stress, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as indigestion, anxiety, and insomnia. The leaves and flowers of Pelargonium × chrysanthemifolium have been used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits including reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × chrysanthemifolium are also used to address symptoms of the common cold and flu, such as fever and congestion.
